title: $:/themes/wikilabs/roundedtabs
author: pmario
name: Rounded Tabs
readme:
A theme that restyles the core `.tc-tab-buttons` markup as a ''segmented control'' — a rounded pill-shaped container holding the tab buttons, with the selected tab raised on the page background.

!! Look and feel

* Container with rounded corners (`8px`), a faint translucent overlay, and the palette's `tab-background` colour
* Inactive buttons are transparent with the `tab-foreground` colour
* The selected button sits on the page `background` colour, is bolded, and gets a 1-pixel inset highlight
* Sidebar tabs follow the same pattern but with sidebar-appropriate margins
* Includes a small offset fix for the [[link-to-tabs|$:/plugins/wikilabs/link-to-tabs]] indicator

!! Dependencies

Depends on `$:/themes/tiddlywiki/snowwhite` for default colours and base styling. Activate it from the Control Panel under ''Appearance → Theme''.
